events.title: Morning Yoga in the Park
events.description: Start your day with a rejuvenating outdoor yoga session surrounded by nature. Suitable for all levels, from beginners to advanced practitioners. Bring your own mat.

events.title: Brooklyn Half Marathon
events.description: Join thousands of runners for the iconic Brooklyn Half Marathon. The 13.1-mile course takes you through historic neighborhoods, past famous landmarks, and along the beautiful waterfront.

events.title: Sunset Beach HIIT
events.description: High-intensity interval training on the sand as the sun sets. This challenging workout combines cardio bursts with strength exercises for maximum calorie burn.

events.title: Lakefront Cycling Tour
events.description: Explore the scenic lakefront on a guided 20-mile cycling tour. Perfect for intermediate cyclists looking to enjoy beautiful views and moderate terrain.

events.title: Aqua Aerobics for All
events.description: Low-impact, high-energy water workout suitable for all fitness levels. Great for joint health while still getting an effective cardiovascular workout.

events.title: CrossFit Competition
events.description: Test your limits at our monthly CrossFit competition. Multiple divisions available for athletes of all skill levels. Prizes for top finishers!

events.title: Sunrise Trail Run
events.description: Experience the magic of a sunrise trail run through beautiful mountain paths. Moderate difficulty, approximately 8 miles with scenic viewpoints.

events.title: Power Vinyasa Flow
events.description: Dynamic, athletic yoga class that builds strength and flexibility. Heated room to help deepen stretches and detoxify. Intermediate to advanced level.

events.title: Weekend Warrior Boot Camp
events.description: Push your limits with this military-style boot camp. Combines strength training, cardio, and teamwork exercises for a full-body challenge.

events.title: Mountain Bike Adventure
events.description: Thrilling mountain biking through challenging terrain. Suitable for experienced riders. Equipment rentals available for those without bikes.

events.title: Open Water Swim Clinic
events.description: Learn essential open water swimming techniques from certified coaches. Perfect preparation for triathlons or adventure swimming.

events.title: Rooftop Pilates
events.description: Strengthen your core with stunning city views at this unique rooftop Pilates class. All equipment provided. Beginners welcome!

events.title: 5K Color Run
events.description: The happiest 5K on the planet! Get covered in colorful powder while running through our fun course. Perfect for families and first-time runners.

events.title: Basketball League Tryouts
events.description: Join our recreational basketball league! Open tryouts for all skill levels. Teams will be balanced for competitive and fun games throughout the season.

events.title: Zumba Dance Party
events.description: Dance your way to fitness with high-energy Latin rhythms! No dance experience needed - just bring your enthusiasm and dancing shoes.

events.title: Kayaking & Yoga Retreat
events.description: Unique outdoor experience combining morning kayaking with afternoon yoga sessions. Includes healthy lunch and all equipment.

events.title: Indoor Cycling Marathon
events.description: Join our 3-hour indoor cycling challenge with rotating instructors, energizing music, and an electric atmosphere. Test your endurance!

events.title: Rock Climbing Intro Course
events.description: Learn the fundamentals of rock climbing in a safe, supportive environment. Covers equipment, safety, and basic techniques. No experience needed.

events.title: Soccer Pick-Up Games
events.description: Weekly soccer games for adults of all skill levels. Show up, get placed on a team, and play! A great way to meet people and stay active.

events.title: Meditation & Stretch Session
events.description: Unwind with guided meditation followed by gentle stretching. Perfect for stress relief and improving flexibility. Suitable for all levels.
